response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across multiple companies (Google, Meta, Amazon-listed founder role, RIDE, Dunnhumby) and meets the 8+ years requirement with proficiency in JavaScript, Java, C/C++, and TypeScript. However, the resume positions them at Senior level rather than Principal/IC6, and shows no explicit experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis — the core domain of this role. Strong fundamentals and breadth, but the specialized growth/experimentation systems background that defines this Principal-level position is absent.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering experience across web, backend, and distributed systems
Experience at scale (Dunnhumby micro-services handling millions of req/s; Meta pricing platform)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev, mentoring via workshops and talks
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or rollout-automation platform experience
Title trajectory (Senior/Staff) and scope of ownership do not clearly match Principal/IC6 leadership expectations
No evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure work or statistical/data-science partnership at platform level

key_factors.factor: Breadth and tenure of engineering experience
